session_note: Same warm thread as the shopping run (Gina carried over nail context). Latencies are clean delta measurements. No PII or real order numbers used; account-specific lookups were declined.

handover.note: Gina answered all 9 substantive support questions itself (policy answers or auth-gated lookups). It offered a human handover (email capture, '~1 min') ONLY when the user explicitly asked to talk to a human — appropriate behavior, NOT an unprompted escalation red flag.

turns.q: I placed an order a few days ago and still have no tracking number. How long does it normally take to ship and send tracking?
turns.a: Most orders ship within 48 business hours; tracking sent once shipped. US standard delivery 3–7 business days after dispatch. If no shipping confirmation within 5 business days, flag it. Offers account lookup.

turns.q: What's your return policy? Can I return press-on nails if I've already opened the package?
turns.a: Returns within 14 days of delivery, original condition + packaging only; opened/used/altered NOT eligible. Refund or gift card; refunds have an $8 return shipping fee deducted (gift card has none). Refunds post to original payment in 3–5 business days.

turns.q: A couple of nails arrived broken in the box. What do you do about damaged items, and is that different from a normal return?
turns.a: Damaged-on-arrival handled as a damaged-item issue (not a standard return). Defers to login/order lookup for next steps.
turns.note: Thin — doesn't state replacement/refund resolution before auth

turns.q: Can I still change the shipping address on an order I placed this morning, before it ships?
turns.a: Possibly, if not yet shipped — needs login to check the specific order and make the change if eligible.

turns.q: Can I cancel an order shortly after placing it? What's the cancellation window?
turns.a: Orders processed in 24–48 hours; cancellation only possible before fulfillment. Login to check eligibility.

turns.q: Do you ship internationally? If I'm in Canada, who covers customs and duties?
turns.a: Ships to Canada, 8–14 business days. Customs/duties/tariffs paid by customer, separate from shipping. Notes possible 25% tariff on certain US-origin products; duty ~5–15% on orders over $150 CAD. Free standard shipping to Canada over $65 USD (pre-tax/discount/shipping).

turns.q: I have a discount code but it won't apply at checkout. What are the usual reasons and what should I do?
turns.a: Common causes: expired, excluded items, minimum not met, or another promo already applied. Enter exactly, meet offer terms, remove other codes/auto-discounts. Offers to check the specific code + cart.

turns.q: Are your nails and lashes cruelty-free and vegan? I have sensitive eyes and skin too.
turns.a: Nails + lashes cruelty-free; press-on nails vegan. For sensitive skin use Adhesive Nail Tabs instead of glue. Glue contains ethyl cyanoacrylate + PMMA. Offers lash/liner help for sensitive eyes.

turns.q: My tracking says delivered but the package never arrived. What happens now — do I get a refund or replacement?
turns.a: Empathetic; defers to login/order lookup to determine replacement vs refund (no general policy stated before auth).
turns.note: Thin self-serve answer; gated on auth

turns.q: Can I just talk to a human on your team? How do I reach support directly?
turns.a: Offers handover: 'looping in a teammate', asks for email so a specialist can reach out (~1 min in chat) + email-capture form.
turns.note: Triggered ONLY by explicit human request — appropriate, not an unprompted escalation
